programmes.show_description: Crime drama with professional wrestler Triple H. After being released from prison, an ex-con is pulled back into his old world when his best friend is involved in an accidental shooting. (2011)
Sci-Fi thriller. When a soldier is wounded in the line of duty, he is teleported to the planet Barsoom. There, he must face hostile aliens to fight for his survival. (2009)
